ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Apcotex Industries Limited's 40th AGM approved the re-appointment of Mr. Ravishankar Sharma as Executive Director for two years, ensuring continuity in management. Materially, shareholders also sanctioned the continuation of Mr. Atul Choksey as a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and Chairman beyond 75 years of age, leveraging his extensive experience. While permitted with shareholder approval under SEBI regulations, his non-independent status and related-party relationships are a governance watch point for investors regarding board independence and succession planning.
